audit_persona: γ GAMMA — Data Truth & Narrative Architect
scope: Every computed numeric metric surfaced on the dashboard. Inventory built by direct file:line reads — no fabrication.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: 0.6 × (blockB match% with partial=0.5) + 0.4 × (score/5 × 100); +5 bonus if ≥3 competitive edges; +5 bonus if score ≥ 4.5; capped at 100
source_data: reports/{nnn}-{slug}-{date}.md → Block B match grid + final Score header
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no — no last_computed_at or mtime check
metrics.null_handling: LIE — returns alignment:0, interview:0, hmNoticing:0 with breakdown.error:'report missing' when report file is missing; UI renders 0% bars with no warning. (alignment-scorer.mjs:188-191)
metrics.smell: HIGH — three metrics silently collapse to 0% when source report is missing. User cannot distinguish 'truly 0% match' from 'no data'.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: BASE_INTERVIEW_RATE(12) + max(0, score-3)*12 + archetype_bonus(A1=10,B=5,A2=3,other=0) + comp_match_bonus(±5) + prior_outcome_adj(±8); capped [2, 85]
source_data: report Comp string for floor match
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no
metrics.confidence_band_present: no — single percentage with no uncertainty band even though weights are heuristic
metrics.null_handling: Same 0% silent-fail as Profile Alignment if report missing. Returns 12% (BASE_INTERVIEW_RATE) for any never-applied-here company with no signals — that's a baseline default but not labeled as such in the bar.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — formula constants (BASE_RATE=12, ±12 per score point, archetype bonuses 10/5/3) are uncited heuristics frozen in code. No backing calibration data referenced.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: score × 14 + min(15, competitiveEdges × 3) + 15 if rare-combo detected + 15 if referral path; capped [2, 95]
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no
metrics.null_handling: hasReferralPath defaults to false at call sites — if caller forgets to pass it, the metric silently loses 15 points with no indication.
metrics.smell: HIGH — referral-path bonus is binary (+15 or 0) but the actual network strength is graded in lib/network-graph.mjs (direct vs one_hop). Bar is overstating noise.

metrics.computing_lib: dashboard-server.mjs:381 computeRecruiterPipelineDensity (NOT lib/recruiter-pipeline-density.mjs — that file does not exist)
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Aggregates listOutreachContacts() into active/responded/dead counts, touches in 7d/30d, lastTouch age. Health verdict via PIPELINE_HEALTH_THRESHOLDS constants (active_healthy:5, touches_healthy:10, response_rate_healthy:0.30).
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — computed_at ISO timestamp returned, but UI does not surface it
metrics.confidence_band_present: no — health verdict is healthy/stretched/critical with no uncertainty
metrics.null_handling: Returns {ok:false, error:'outreach tracker unavailable'} if listOutreachContacts() throws — UI behavior unverified for this branch.
metrics.smell: CRITICAL — three lies in one tooltip at build-dashboard.mjs:19782-19784: (1) claims source file is lib/recruiter-pipeline-density.mjs which DOES NOT EXIST; (2) View source GitHub link points to that 404 path; (3) Runway formula description 'touches over 30d ÷ weekly budget + buffer weeks' is invented — actual code uses a static RUNWAY_WEEKS_DEFAULT=12 env constant, not a touch-derived calculation.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Math.round((now - max(touch.ts)) / 86400000)
metrics.freshness_signal_present: yes — value IS the freshness
metrics.null_handling: Returns null if no touches found; rendered as ?-or-? blank in widget.
metrics.smell: LOW — value is correct; only smell is silent null when contacts file has no touches at all.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Sum of unique-kind driver weights, capped at 10. Driver weights: layoffs(3), leadership_exit(2), manual_toxic(3), culture_ethics_discard(2), hiring_freeze(1), public_scandal(2), short_tenure(1), funding_distress(2).
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — computed_at on each result + sources_scanned list, BUT no per-source freshness (e.g., 'intel-cache is 45 days stale')
metrics.confidence_band_present: yes — low/med/high based on driver count (≥3=high, 2=med, ≤1=low)
metrics.last_computed_at_present: yes (computed_at ISO timestamp on every return)
metrics.null_handling: Empty slug returns score:0, drivers:[], confidence:'low', auto_trash:false with schema_note — GOOD. Per-source absence handled via sources_scanned inventory.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — confidence band uses driver-count only, not source quality. A single council-of-models driver (high-confidence multi-LLM consensus) is 'low' confidence; two noisy regex matches in hm-intel notes are 'med'. Heuristic is too coarse.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Sum of 5 driver scores: equity_stage(0-30) + ai_native(0-25) + salary_band(0-25) + ipo_trajectory(0-10) + skill_portability(0-10) = 0-100
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no — no overall computed_at; CURRENT.md mtime not checked
metrics.confidence_band_present: partial — hasPartialData boolean + per-driver hasData; no aggregate confidence
metrics.null_handling: AGGRESSIVE FALLBACK — scoreSkillPortability returns 10/10 (the max) by default for unknown verticals with hasData:false. Score inflated when data missing.
metrics.smell: HIGH — companies with 60%+ missing data still rank visibly because of optimistic defaults (especially skill_portability's default-10). hasPartialData boolean is too coarse to convey severity.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: openai:gpt-5 call with prompt baked at line 164, hardcoded 'Today is 2026-05-17 PT'
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no — LLM cache TTL not exposed in render
metrics.last_computed_at_present: partial (cache file has generated_at; not surfaced in UI)
metrics.null_handling: LLM fallback path returns a stub if call fails — verified in wealth-lens.mjs.
metrics.smell: HIGH — wealth-lens.mjs:164 hardcodes 'Today is 2026-05-17 PT' in the prompt. Every LLM call from now on lies about today. Same lie at line 348 in the comp benchmarking prompt.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: LLM-only — gpt-5 returns ceiling/gap_pct/actions array, schema-validated.
source_data: Mitchell brand string baked in prompt
metrics.freshness_signal_present: cache age tracked via generated_at; UI shows 'Cached result' label but not the age in days/hours
metrics.confidence_band_present: no — single ceiling number with no uncertainty band even though it's a free-form LLM output
metrics.last_computed_at_present: yes in data, no in UI
metrics.null_handling: Degraded fallback at strategy-ceiling.mjs:278-313 caches 3 GENERIC ACTIONS with fabricated expected_lift_pct values (10+8+15=33% lift from no data) and writes that to disk for 1 hour. User cannot distinguish 'real strategy' from 'LLM failed, here's a placeholder.' The _degraded:true flag IS shown in render as 'LLM unavailable — showing fallback actions' but the action lift numbers are still presented as if real.
metrics.smell: CRITICAL — hardcoded date 'Today is 2026-05-17 PT' at strategy-ceiling.mjs:119. Plus the degraded-fallback shows fabricated lift percentages with the _degraded warning banner but no removal of the misleading lift numbers.

surface_locations: dashboard widgets that consume computeNextMoves output
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Math.max(0, round((deadlineMs - todayMs) / 86400000))
source_data: profile.deadline_iso, defaulting to hardcoded '2026-09-30' at next-moves.mjs:55
metrics.freshness_signal_present: yes — generated_at
metrics.null_handling: If profile.deadline_iso missing, SILENTLY uses 2026-09-30 hardcoded constant. UI does not indicate the deadline source was profile vs default.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — hardcoded 2026-09-30 deadline-default in code. Drift risk: when Mitchell's actual deadline changes, the default still lingers as a fallback.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: (target_applications_for_offer || 25 - appsApplied) / (daysLeft/7); rendered with .toFixed(1)
metrics.freshness_signal_present: yes (generated_at)
metrics.null_handling: If daysLeft == 0, renders '—'.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — target_applications_for_offer default is hardcoded 25 with no source/calibration. Some users may have a target of 5 or 50 — defaulting to 25 silently anchors apps-per-week.

metrics.metric_name: Next Moves — Top N Composite Scores
metrics.compute_formula_summary: composite = impact / sqrt(cost + 0.1); impact = quality × leverage × time_sensitivity × confidence (0-1 each)
metrics.freshness_signal_present: yes (generated_at)
metrics.confidence_band_present: partial — confidence factor is baked into impact but not exposed alongside the composite_score
metrics.null_handling: Composite includes a confidence factor — graceful when subsystems missing.
metrics.smell: LOW — the COST_FLOOR=0.1 constant prevents inf, but the choice of sqrt cost penalty (vs linear or log) is unjustified in comments.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: 4-tier resolution: overrides JSON > COMPANY_SPECIFIC table > STAGE_DEFAULTS table > 'unknown' fallback (10 weeks).
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — basis field tells you which tier produced the value, but no computed_at
metrics.null_handling: Falls back through tiers, never returns null. basis:'unknown' + confidence:'low' indicates inferred.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — COMPANY_SPECIFIC table is hardcoded in source code with timestamp commit '2026-05' baked into comments. Cycle-time signals rot. Apple may have changed its loop length and the table is silently stale. No mechanism to refresh from a current source.

metrics.metric_name: Network Graph — direct + one_hop contact counts
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Filter people array by current_company substring match (direct) and evidence_sources context match (one_hop).
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no — graph file mtime not surfaced
metrics.null_handling: Returns empty arrays + no_path:true if graph file missing. Returns null from getNetworkSummary if missing. UI consumer behavior unverified.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — in-process cache `_cache = null` at line 19 never expires after first load; long-running dashboard-server processes pin to whichever version of graph file was first read. Stale-cache bug latent.

metrics.metric_name: Funnel Completion — Evaluated/Applied counts + gap nudge
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Count rows with status in {Evaluated, Responded, Interview} vs {Applied}. has_gap = evaluated > 0 && applied == 0.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no
metrics.null_handling: Returns has_gap:false with explanation 'No rows provided.' if input not array.
metrics.smell: LOW — fine; just lacks a last_computed_at.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: SEED_TABLE 12-row scoring table, weighted by Mitchell's archetype mappings.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no
metrics.null_handling: Static — never null.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — entirely seed-table driven; comment at build-dashboard.mjs:15038 says 'can edit lib/industry-gap.mjs SEED_TABLE to tune weights or add rows' — that's a code-as-data anti-pattern but acceptable for a 12-row table. No freshness indicator anywhere.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Days since last touch + last report regen — into bands.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: yes — IS the freshness metric
metrics.null_handling: Returns 'fresh' band for rows with no signals.
metrics.smell: LOW — by design.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Lookup against cached comp research JSON per company-slug. LLM-backed when cache miss.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — cache file mtime not surfaced
metrics.null_handling: Returns null on cache miss; UI shows '—'.
metrics.smell: MEDIUM — when LLM call needed (no cache), the prompt embeds 'Today is 2026-05-17 PT' via wealth-lens.mjs:348. Bad date anchor.

metrics.metric_name: Equity Calculator — vest schedule + cliff payouts
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Standard 4-year vest with 1-year cliff, monthly accrual after cliff.
source_data: User input via slider — no upstream source
metrics.freshness_signal_present: n/a (interactive)
metrics.null_handling: Defaults to placeholder values until user moves sliders.
metrics.smell: LOW — uses 'calibration brief 2026-05-16' as anchor for floor/target ($175K/$250-320K). Acceptable since these are personal preferences; ideally read from config/profile.yml instead of in-code constants.

metrics.metric_name: Peer Context Table (median + p25 + p75 comp)
metrics.compute_formula_summary: Quartile summary across cached peer compensation data.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: no
metrics.confidence_band_present: yes — sample size + p25/p75 spread visible
metrics.null_handling: Renders 'Peer comp data not available — run node lib/peer-context.mjs to populate.' (build-dashboard.mjs:14287) — GOOD, explicit empty-state.
metrics.smell: LOW — this is a model citizen for empty-state design. Other metrics should copy this pattern.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Surfaces the evaluation chain that produced a row (council inputs, dealbreaker passes, eval-citation-validator).
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — surfaces individual call timestamps when available
metrics.null_handling: Returns minimal placeholder if no provenance found.
metrics.smell: LOW — this is what other metrics should look like.

metrics.compute_formula_summary: Aggregates HM priorities from hm-intel JSON, weights against role keywords.
metrics.freshness_signal_present: partial — file mtime is checkable; UI surfaces 'researched at' timestamp on the card
metrics.confidence_band_present: partial — uses the hm-intel research's own confidence_level when present
metrics.null_handling: Renders pending state if no hm-intel for slug.
metrics.smell: LOW — best of breed for provenance surfacing. Other metrics should copy.

false_attributions.severity: CRITICAL — falsely attributes computation to a file that does not exist; GitHub link returns 404

hardcoded_dates.consequence: Every gpt-5 strategy-ceiling call lies about today's date. LLM 'in the last X days' reasoning anchors to wrong day.
Wealth-lens LLM call lies about today's date.
Comp-benchmarking LLM call lies about today's date.
If profile.deadline_iso missing, days_left silently uses 2026-09-30 default.

silent_zero_fallbacks.metric_collapse: alignment=0, interview=0, hmNoticing=0 when reportPath missing or does not exist
silent_zero_fallbacks.user_visible_smell: 3 bars render at 0% with no warning

silent_zero_fallbacks.metric_collapse: scoreSkillPortability returns 10/10 default (the max) for unknown verticals
silent_zero_fallbacks.user_visible_smell: Composite wealth score inflated by up to 10 points when skill_portability has no data

stale_in_process_caches.issue: let _cache = null with no TTL; never re-reads data/network-graph.json after first load
stale_in_process_caches.impact: long-running dashboard-server processes serve stale network graph
